heroHeadline: Russian Drone Strike Destroys Historic Building in Ukraine as War Enters Day 1,503
heroSubtitle: Footage shows historic structure engulfed in flames as Russia continues targeting civilian and cultural infrastructure across Ukrainian cities
footerNote: Data sourced from UN OHCHR, ISW, CSIS, Ukrainian MoD, US DoD, NATO, IAEA, and major news outlets including Reuters, BBC, AP, Al Jazeera, Bloomberg, and Kyiv Independent. Casualty figures are estimates; Russia has never released official figures.
